name: accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll tax filings/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll tax filings/month, manual data entry causes delays in audit readiness. We automate report generation instead of manual data entry and report generation.
target_audience: accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll tax filings/month
problem_solved: Difficulty in generating timely and accurate payroll tax reports for audits.
features: data extraction from payroll tax filings

must_have_features: data extraction from payroll tax filings

one_liner: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll tax filings/month, manual data entry causes delays in audit readiness. We automate report generation instead of manual data entry and report generation.
